faq_text:
FAQ:
1) Free: 42 successful deliveries per month, 3-hour duration limit.
2) Premium: unlimited deliveries, 10-hour duration limit.
3) In Premium, you can edit audio metadata (title/artist) after delivery.
4) Metadata edit session TTL is 1 hour from the last action.
